license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.h58b89w
title: Simple DNA Extraction for Phytoplankton Using Chelex 100
author: G Jason Smith

steps_raw.instruction: Add 5.0 g Chelex 100 to a clean 50 mL Falcon Tube. Chelex 100 Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich) Catalog #C7901-100G
Filter samples using 25 mm polycarbonate filters.
Add 0.5 g Polyvinylpolypyrrolidone to the same 50 mL Falcon Tube. Polyvinylpolypyrrolidone Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich) Catalog #77627-25G
Resuspend in 50 mL nuclease free H 2 O by vortexing to hydrate. Ultrapure Distilled, Nuclease Free Water Contributed by users
Wash sample and collect suspension by centrifugation at 3000 xg, 10 min.
Decant supernatant and repeat nuclease free H 2 O wash. Ultrapure Distilled, Nuclease Free Water Contributed by users
Decant supernatant and resuspend pellet in 50 mL 0.1X TE buffer, pH = 8. Vortex sample. TE Buffer Contributed by users
Incubate sample with mixing for 10 min.
Centrifuge to collect suspension at 3000 xg, 10 min.
Decant, and resuspend pellet in 50 mL 0.1X TE buffer, pH=8. TE Buffer Contributed by users

Aliquot 300 µL of mixed suspension into a 1.5 mL tube. Be sure to completely resuspend extraction buffer prior to aliquoting. For cell pellets--add 300 µL Chelex suspension directly to pellet and proceed as above. Volume of Chelex can be adjusted for biomass of samples, but 300 µL is a good starting point.
Add filter into extraction tube, seal and vortex to resuspend cell sample. Do not fold the filter.
Vortex and centrifuge at 10,000 xg, 3 min to sediment particles.
Generally, dilute DNA extract supernatant 1:10 with TE buffer at pH=8 for PCR assays. TE Buffer Contributed by users

DNA concentration and quality can be increased using the Zymo Genomic DNA Clean & Concentrator-10 spin columns following the manufactures protocol. Genomic DNA Clean & Concentrator-10 Zymo Research Catalog #D4011
